title: Direct ndx/agent/server/context verification with sample project fixtures

model_prompt.title: Exact model prompt file is selected
model_prompt.test: A sample project fixture must be created under test/sampleproject/model-exact-file. The session metadata must use that fixture project as projectHome/cwd and model abc. The probe must create userHome/.ndx/system/modelprompt/abc.md with MODEL_EXACT_ABC_PROMPT, call buildContext and resolveModelInstruction directly, and prove that both the resolved prompt and developer model_instruction contain the exact abc.md content.

steps.instruction: Run TMPDIR=/tmp yarn workspace ndx exec tsx ../../test/20260512/context-probe.ts model-exact-file.
steps.expected: The command exits 0 and prints JSON with fixture.promptPath ending in test/sampleproject/model-exact-file/home/.ndx/system/modelprompt/abc.md, observed.sessionMetadata.model equal to abc, observed.resolvedPrompt equal to MODEL_EXACT_ABC_PROMPT\n, and observed.developerModelInstruction equal to MODEL_EXACT_ABC_PROMPT.

model_prompt.passCriteria: The evidence directly shows the abc model file was created in the sample user home and was the model_instruction used by buildContext.

model_prompt.title: Colon-suffixed model names fall back rightward
model_prompt.test: A sample project fixture must be created under test/sampleproject/model-colon-fallback. The probe must create abc.md, call buildContext with model abc:provider:local, and prove that rightward colon stripping resolves abc.md.

steps.instruction: Run TMPDIR=/tmp yarn workspace ndx exec tsx ../../test/20260512/context-probe.ts model-colon-fallback.
steps.expected: The command exits 0 and prints JSON with observed.sessionMetadata.model equal to abc:provider:local, observed.resolvedPrompt equal to MODEL_COLON_BASE_PROMPT\n, and observed.developerModelInstruction equal to MODEL_COLON_BASE_PROMPT.

model_prompt.passCriteria: The evidence directly shows a colon-suffixed model selected the base abc.md prompt.

model_prompt.title: Default user prompt is selected when model prompt is absent
model_prompt.test: A sample project fixture must be created under test/sampleproject/model-default-file. The probe must create only userHome/.ndx/system/modelprompt/default.md, call buildContext with a missing model name, and prove the default file is used.

steps.instruction: Run TMPDIR=/tmp yarn workspace ndx exec tsx ../../test/20260512/context-probe.ts model-default-file.
steps.expected: The command exits 0 and prints JSON with fixture.promptPath ending in default.md, observed.sessionMetadata.model equal to missing-model, observed.resolvedPrompt equal to MODEL_DEFAULT_PROMPT\n, and observed.developerModelInstruction equal to MODEL_DEFAULT_PROMPT.

model_prompt.passCriteria: The evidence directly shows the sample user default.md was the model_instruction used by buildContext.

model_prompt.title: Bundled default prompt is available before user init
model_prompt.test: A sample project fixture must be created under test/sampleproject/model-bundled-default without any user .ndx model prompt. The probe must call buildContext and resolveModelInstruction directly and prove the bundled default prompt is returned.

steps.instruction: Run TMPDIR=/tmp yarn workspace ndx exec tsx ../../test/20260512/context-probe.ts model-bundled-default.
steps.expected: The command exits 0 and prints JSON with observed.sessionMetadata.model equal to missing-model, observed.resolvedPromptStart containing You are NDX, and observed.developerModelInstructionStart containing You are NDX.

model_prompt.passCriteria: The evidence directly shows buildContext can construct model instructions before initNDX seeds the user home.

model_prompt.title: initNDX seeded default prompt enters buildContext
model_prompt.test: A sample project fixture must be created under test/sampleproject/initndx-default-context. The probe must run initNDX with that sample userHome/projectHome, read the seeded default.md, call buildContext, and prove the developer model_instruction exactly equals the trimmed seeded default prompt.

steps.instruction: Run TMPDIR=/tmp yarn workspace ndx exec tsx ../../test/20260512/context-probe.ts initndx-default-context.
steps.expected: The command exits 0 and prints JSON with fixture.promptPath ending in default.md, observed.seededPromptStart containing You are NDX, observed.developerModelInstructionStart containing You are NDX, and observed.exactTrimmedMatch equal to true.

model_prompt.passCriteria: The evidence directly shows initNDX seeded the prompt file and buildContext consumed that seeded prompt.

model_prompt.title: Model-specific prompt under initialized .ndx overrides default
model_prompt.test: A sample project fixture must be created under test/sampleproject/initndx-model-specific-context. The probe must run initNDX, then create userHome/.ndx/system/modelprompt/abc.md, call buildContext with model abc, and prove abc.md overrides the seeded default prompt.

steps.instruction: Run TMPDIR=/tmp yarn workspace ndx exec tsx ../../test/20260512/context-probe.ts initndx-model-specific-context.
steps.expected: The command exits 0 and prints JSON with observed.sessionMetadata.model equal to abc, observed.developerModelInstruction equal to MODEL_SPECIFIC_AFTER_INIT, and observed.containsBundledDefaultIdentity equal to false.

model_prompt.passCriteria: The evidence directly shows a model-specific prompt in initialized .ndx wins over default.md.

model_prompt.title: Model prompt filenames sanitize slash characters
model_prompt.test: A sample project fixture must be created under test/sampleproject/model-slash-sanitized. The probe must create local_abc.md, call buildContext with model local/abc, and prove slash characters are mapped to underscores before reading the prompt file.

steps.instruction: Run TMPDIR=/tmp yarn workspace ndx exec tsx ../../test/20260512/context-probe.ts model-slash-sanitized.
steps.expected: The command exits 0 and prints JSON with observed.sessionMetadata.model equal to local/abc, fixture.promptPath ending in local_abc.md, observed.resolvedPrompt equal to MODEL_SLASH_SANITIZED_PROMPT\n, and observed.developerModelInstruction equal to MODEL_SLASH_SANITIZED_PROMPT.

model_prompt.passCriteria: The evidence directly shows the sanitized model filename was used.

agents_cascade.title: Home and project AGENTS instructions are included in order
agents_cascade.test: A sample project fixture must be created under test/sampleproject/home-and-project-agents. The probe must create userHome/.ndx/AGENTS.md and projectHome/AGENTS.md, call buildContext, and prove both rendered headers are present and home instructions precede project instructions.

steps.instruction: Run TMPDIR=/tmp yarn workspace ndx exec tsx ../../test/20260512/context-probe.ts home-and-project-agents.
steps.expected: The command exits 0 and prints JSON with observed.orderedPolicies [HOME_AGENT_POLICY, PROJECT_ROOT_POLICY], strictly increasing observed.indexes, and observed.renderedHeaders [true, true].

agents_cascade.passCriteria: The evidence directly shows both AGENTS files were read from the sample fixture and rendered in the required order.

agents_cascade.title: Project AGENTS cascade reaches cwd ancestors
agents_cascade.test: A sample project fixture must be created under test/sampleproject/project-to-cwd-cascade. The probe must create AGENTS.md at userHome/.ndx, project root, project/apps, and project/apps/agent; use cwd project/apps/agent/src; call buildContext; and prove all existing files are rendered in cascade order while the missing cwd AGENTS.md path is not rendered.

steps.instruction: Run TMPDIR=/tmp yarn workspace ndx exec tsx ../../test/20260512/context-probe.ts project-to-cwd-cascade.
steps.expected: The command exits 0 and prints JSON with observed.orderedPolicies [HOME_POLICY, ROOT_POLICY, APPS_POLICY, AGENT_POLICY], strictly increasing observed.indexes, observed.renderedHeaders [true, true, true, true], and observed.missingCwdAgentsRendered false.

agents_cascade.passCriteria: The evidence directly shows the AGENTS cascade from user home through cwd ancestors and shows missing cwd AGENTS is skipped.

agents_cascade.title: Project AGENTS is not duplicated when cwd equals projectHome
agents_cascade.test: A sample project fixture must be created under test/sampleproject/project-cwd-no-duplicate. The probe must create projectHome/AGENTS.md, set cwd equal to projectHome, call buildContext, and count the project policy occurrences.

steps.instruction: Run TMPDIR=/tmp yarn workspace ndx exec tsx ../../test/20260512/context-probe.ts project-cwd-no-duplicate.
steps.expected: The command exits 0 and prints JSON with observed.projectPolicyOccurrences equal to 1.

agents_cascade.passCriteria: The evidence directly shows the project AGENTS content is rendered exactly once.

agents_cascade.title: cwd outside projectHome does not leak unrelated AGENTS
agents_cascade.test: A sample project fixture must be created under test/sampleproject/outside-cwd-agents-ignored. The probe must create user-home and project AGENTS files, create an unrelated outside cwd AGENTS.md, call buildContext with cwd outside projectHome, and prove only the home and project policies render while environment_context still reports the outside cwd.

steps.instruction: Run TMPDIR=/tmp yarn workspace ndx exec tsx ../../test/20260512/context-probe.ts outside-cwd-agents-ignored.
steps.expected: The command exits 0 and prints JSON with observed.containsHomePolicy true, observed.containsProjectPolicy true, observed.containsOutsidePolicy false, and observed.environmentContextCwd equal to the outside cwd tag.

agents_cascade.passCriteria: The evidence directly shows unrelated outside cwd AGENTS content does not leak into user context.

context_shape.title: User-home system prompt is rendered as developer instructions
context_shape.test: A sample project fixture must be created under test/sampleproject/developer-system-prompt. The probe must create userHome/.ndx/system-promt.md, call buildContext, and prove the exact developer_instructions section is present.

steps.instruction: Run TMPDIR=/tmp yarn workspace ndx exec tsx ../../test/20260512/context-probe.ts developer-system-prompt.
steps.expected: The command exits 0 and prints JSON with fixture.systemPromptPath ending in .ndx/system-promt.md and observed.developerInstructionsRendered true.

context_shape.passCriteria: The evidence directly shows the sample user-home system prompt is rendered as developer instructions.

context_shape.title: Missing user-home system prompt is omitted
context_shape.test: A sample project fixture must be created under test/sampleproject/developer-system-prompt-absent without system-promt.md. The probe must call buildContext and prove developer_instructions is absent while model_instruction remains present.

steps.instruction: Run TMPDIR=/tmp yarn workspace ndx exec tsx ../../test/20260512/context-probe.ts developer-system-prompt-absent.
steps.expected: The command exits 0 and prints JSON with observed.developerInstructionsRendered false and observed.modelInstructionRendered true.

context_shape.passCriteria: The evidence directly shows missing system-promt.md is omitted without removing model_instruction.

context_shape.title: buildContext returns developer and user strings with environment metadata
context_shape.test: A sample project fixture must be created under test/sampleproject/context-output-shape. The probe must call buildContext with cwd under the sample project, currentDate 2026-05-12, and timezone Asia/Seoul, then prove developer/user are strings and environment_context exactly contains cwd, bash shell, date, and timezone.

steps.instruction: Run TMPDIR=/tmp yarn workspace ndx exec tsx ../../test/20260512/context-probe.ts context-output-shape.
steps.expected: The command exits 0 and prints JSON with observed.developerType string, observed.userType string, and observed.actualEnvironmentContext equal to observed.expectedEnvironmentContext.

context_shape.passCriteria: The evidence directly shows the context output shape and environment metadata are correct for the sample session metadata.
